
### why can't we...  {.smaller}


::: {.r-stack}

![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseNoForward.figure-1.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseNoForward.figure-2.svg){width=800px .fragment .fade-in fragment-index=1}

:::

::: {.myoverbox .vlow .fragment fragment-index=3}

clock cycle needs to be long enough <br/>
to go through data cache AND <br/>
to go through math circuits! <br/>
(which we were trying to avoid by putting them in separate stages)

:::


![](/pipeline/texfig/invalidOverlay.figure.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center }
